title: arabis furcata var. olympica
intro: Arabis furcata var. olympica, also known as Alpine Rockcress, is a perennial plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae), native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Arabis furcata var. olympica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Arabis furcata var. olympica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
